calendar.matters:
Status Of Filing Of Receipt And Acknowledgment Of Order For The Deposit Of Money Into Blocked Account
Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Vacated

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
J. Scott Waver, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Patricia Petersen mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Nicole Petersen.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $70,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 17,500.00 payable to Law Offices of Paul Behrend.

A net balance of $52,500.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at Wells Fargo Bank One Montgomery Street, San Francisco, CA 94104 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on October 17, 2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
